steps.title: Use hemisphere volume
steps.content: A hemisphere has half the volume of a sphere, so $$V=\frac{1}{2}\cdot\frac{4}{3}\pi r^3=\frac{2}{3}\pi r^3$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The closest answer choice is $41{,}200$, so D is correct.

steps.title: Check the scale of the answer
steps.content: Since $27^3=19{,}683$, the volume should be in the tens of thousands of cubic inches. That rules out $1{,}500$ and $6{,}100$, and $41{,}200$ is closest to $13{,}122pi$.
